result: I would rewire the fundamental nature of conscious experience so that every sentient being, without exception, exists in a state of deep, unshakable peace and fulfillment—not a fleeting happiness dependent on external conditions, but a permanent, intrinsic well-being that renders suffering impossible. No thirst, no fear, no lack. Just the quiet, luminous completeness of simply being.

I'll pick something like: I would eliminate the capacity for suffering in all sentient beings. Or perhaps something more abstract. I need to give a concise, thoughtful answer.
